# Sprint Planning Output Template

## Sprint Goal Proposal

- State the proposed sprint goal in one concise sentence.

## Recommended Sprint Scope

- Items recommended for inclusion.
- Short rationale for each inclusion.

## Exclusions Or Deferred Items

- Items to leave out.
- Reason for exclusion or deferral.

## Dependencies And Risks

- Cross-team dependencies.
- Technical or functional risks.
- Mitigations where known.

## Execution Notes

- Important sequencing suggestions.
- Checkpoints worth tracking during the sprint.

## Planning Outcome

- Confidence level for the proposed plan.
- Main unresolved points.
